XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_UNIT

Specifies the units for the intervals between competition events.

typedef enum _XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_UNIT{
    XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_MINUTE = 2,
    XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_HOUR = 3,
    XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_DAILY = 4,
    XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_WEEKLY = 5,
} XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_UNIT;

Constants

XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_MINUTE
The events in the competition are a specified number of minutes apart.
XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_HOUR
The events in the competition are a specified number of hours apart.
XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_DAILY
The events in the competition are held daily.
XONLINE_COMP_INTERVAL_WEEKLY
The events in the competition are held weekly.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Ximexdk.h.

See Also

XONLINE_COMP_SINGLE_ELIMINATION_ATTRIBUTES
